title.en: Otherwise, you will still be blocked.

content.en:
If the half-step Eternal Realm in the Source Sea wants to go to the space-time territory, one of the most common ways is to take refuge in a certain space-time lord and let the space-time lord leave the Source Sea with him.

But after all these years of exploration, Ye Tian also knew a way, that is, to enter the space-time territory through the space-time island, which was also an opportunity for the Lords Alliance to give the half-step Eternal Realm of the Source Sea to enter the space-time territory.

Among the countless space-time territories, many space-time lords do not have lords, but public space-time territories, allowing any half-step eternal realm to enter.

However, the space-time territory is only open to the Polar Realm, and the general Polar Realm still cannot enter the space-time territory, and you need to pass the assessment before you can leave the Source Sea.

In addition, even if you pass the assessment, you still have to pay a certain fee to the manager of the space-time island as a toll.

Otherwise, you will still be blocked.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body came to the space-time island, which was actually transformed from the fragments of a space-time territory, and the entrance was very hidden.

Ye Tian entered the space-time island and was immediately stopped by the two puppets.

This is not an ordinary puppet, but a puppet whose strength is comparable to that of the Six Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm.

"I'm here to participate in the assessment of the space-time island, and I want to go to the space-time territory!"

Ye Tian expressed his intention.

"Come with me!"

A puppet took Ye Tian to a tower in the space-time territory.

Here, Ye Tian needs to be assessed.

In fact, as long as the strength is in the Five Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm, there is a great hope of passing the assessment, but not many people want to go to the space-time territory.

After all, the lifespan is eternal, and the cultivation of the Five or Six Extreme Realms in the Source Sea is also very comfortable, and if he finds a great opportunity, no one will snatch it from him.

And when you go to the space-time territory, it is more difficult to find a good opportunity, and there is a great hope of falling.

Soon.

The space-time island arranged an assessment for Ye Tian, that is, to fight with a puppet whose strength was in the Five Extremes Realm, Ye Tian easily defeated the other party, and thus passed the assessment.

In front of the space-time passage of the space-time island, an old man guards here.

He is not a puppet, he is an Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm existence, and his strength is very strong.

Ye Tian estimated that his strength had at least reached the Seven-Extremes Realm and a half-step Eternal Realm, and even the Eight-Extremes Realm and a half-step Eternal Realm.

"To enter the space-time territory, you need to pay resources worth 100,000 space-time coins. "

The old man said coldly.

The space-time coin is a currency of the space-time territory, and Ye Tian knows it.

So, he took out some resources and quickly gathered 100,000 space-time coins.

"There are three space-time territories that this space-time channel can go to, namely Qingze Territory, Baixue Territory and Maple Leaf Territory, all of which are relatively large and openly ownerless territories in space-time territory, you choose a territory, I will open the space-time channel and send you over. The old man introduced.

"Maple Leaf Territory!"

Ye Tian chose the Dao at random.

Bang!!!!!

The space-time passage opened, forming a huge space-time vortex.

Ye Tian walked into the space-time vortex, and was immediately pulled by a powerful force, and his entire body directly shattered the space-time rules of the Source Sea, and even smashed the Source Sea barrier, and entered another world.

......

Darkness, nothingness, emptiness, endlessness.

This is the void area between the source sea and the space-time territory, there are no rules, no energy, everything is nothing.

Ye Tian was in the space-time passage, and he felt the suffocation in the void area, and his body was a little uncomfortable.

But soon, he came to the end of the space-time passage - the Maple Leaf Territory.

Regarding the situation in the Maple Leaf Territory, Ye Tian really didn't know anything about it.

Therefore, the first thing he did when he came here was to familiarize himself with the environment and understand the situation of the space-time territory.

Maple Leaf Territory, Heavenly Imperial City.

This city is connected to a number of space-time territories, and it is a well-known city in the Maple Leaf Territory.

After Ye Tian settled in Maple Leaf City, he began to understand the situation of the Maple Leaf Territory.

After a while, Ye Tian had a general understanding of the situation here.

The Maple Leaf Territory is not very large, in terms of area, it is only as big as an exotic world, compared to the Origin Sea, it is simply not worth mentioning.

However, the area of the space-time territory is small, but the cultivation environment here is even better than that of the Eternal Heaven and Earth, and a little resource put into the Eternal Heaven and Earth is enough for many supreme beings to compete for.

Moreover, the races born in the space-time territory are all very powerful, and they can easily cultivate to the supreme one.

Of course.

In the space-time territory, it is very difficult to become a half-step Eternal Realm.

To Ye Tian's surprise, the creatures of the space-time territory could not exist forever, and their lifespan was limited.

For example, the supreme beings in the space-time territory, the lifespan limit is 100,000 eternal years, although it is a long time, but after all, there is a limit, and the lifespan of many ordinary powerhouses in the source sea is unlimited.

"This may be the flaw of the space-time territory!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the space-time territory, the half-step Eternal Realm can only live for 10 million eternal years, and only the Eternal Realm Lord is truly eternal.

Perhaps it is this restriction that has caused the space-time territory not to have an extinction crisis due to the expansion of living beings.

In addition, the battles in the space-time territories are very frequent, so the various space-time territories can operate in a balanced manner.

The Maple Leaf Territory has many half-step Eternal Realms, even Extreme Realm powerhouses, and the strongest ones are the three Eight-Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses.

The status of the powerhouses of the Eight-Extremes Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm is second only to the ordinary Eternal Realm, and they have a high prestige and power in the Maple Leaf Territory, and many half-step Eternal Realms have taken refuge in them.

In addition to these, Ye Tian also learned about the division of space-time territories.

The space-time territory is divided into ordinary space-time territory and eternal space-time territory, and the maple leaf territory is an ordinary space-time territory, but it is a good kind of ordinary space-time territory.

However, the Maple Leaf Territory did not give birth to top-notch resources, so it was not valued by the newly promoted Eternal Realm Lord, and it is still an open ownerless territory.

Among the endless space-time territories, there are many such ordinary space-time territories, and there are many broken space-time territories.

However, there are not many eternal space-time territories, only hundreds, and the lords of each eternal space-time territory are incomparably terrifying existences in the eternal realm.

For Ye Tian, the Maple Leaf Territory is quite suitable for him and can be used as his starting place.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to make friends with one extreme realm after another, and only after making friends with more extreme realms did he have the opportunity to contact some opportunities and intelligence.

Finally, on this day, an Extreme Realm invited Ye Tian to join a relatively free force.
